targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_read_.+_count", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))
sum by (cluster) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_write_.+_count", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))

sum by (cluster) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_failures_(read|write)_.+_total", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))

sum by (cluster) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_timeouts_(read|write)_.+_total", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))

sum by (cluster) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_unavailables_(read|write)_.+_total", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_read_.+_bucket", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, cluster))

histogram_quantile(0.999, sum(rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_read_.+_bucket", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, cluster))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_write_.+_bucket", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, cluster))

histogram_quantile(0.999, sum(rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_write_.+_bucket", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, cluster))
sum by (host_name) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_pending_compactions{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})

panels.description: Active threads per pool, stacked cluster-wide. Total height = total active threads. Useful for seeing which pools are saturated and what's driving load.

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, pool_name) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_thread_pools_active_tasks{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})

panels.title: Active Tasks by Pool (cluster-wide)

targets.expr: 100 - (avg by(host_name, cluster) (rate(system_cpu_time_seconds_total{state="idle", host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m])) * 100)
system_cpu_load_average_1m{host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}
system_memory_usage_bytes{state="used", host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}
rate(system_disk_io_bytes_total{direction="read", host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m])
rate(system_disk_io_bytes_total{direction="write", host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m])
rate(system_network_io_bytes_total{direction="receive", host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m])
rate(system_network_io_bytes_total{direction="transmit", host_name=~"db.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[1m])

panels.description: Read p99 latency per node. Useful for spotting hot nodes or uneven load distribution across the cluster.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, host_name) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_read_.+_bucket", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Read p99 per Node

panels.description: Write p99 latency per node. Useful for spotting hot nodes or uneven load distribution across the cluster.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, host_name) (rate({__name__=~"org_apache_cassandra_metrics_client_request_latency_write_.+_bucket", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Write p99 per Node

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_live_disk_space_used{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
sum by (cluster) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_total_disk_space_used{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
max by (cluster, keyspace, table) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_live_ss_table_count{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
max by (cluster) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_live_ss_table_count{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})

panels.description: Rate of bytes written by compaction across all nodes. A sustained high value means compaction is keeping up with writes; a drop while pending count rises means compaction is falling behind.

targets.expr: sum by (host_name) (irate(org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_compaction_bytes_written{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))

panels.title: Compaction Throughput

targets.expr: max by (keyspace, table) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_table_ss_tables_per_read_histogram{quantile="0.99", keyspace!~"system.*|sidecar_internal", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack"})
sum by (cluster, pool_name) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_thread_pools_pending_tasks{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
sum by (cluster, pool_name) (rate(org_apache_cassandra_metrics_thread_pools_total_blocked_tasks{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))
sum by (cluster, message_type) (rate(org_apache_cassandra_metrics_dropped_message_dropped_total{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))
sum by (cluster) (org_apache_cassandra_metrics_storage_total_hints_in_progress{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
max by (cluster) (1 - sum by (cluster, datacenter, rack, host_name) (rate(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m])))
min by (cluster) (1 - sum by (cluster, datacenter, rack, host_name) (rate(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m])))
avg by (cluster) (1 - sum by (cluster, datacenter, rack, host_name) (rate(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m])))

panels.title: Application Throughput (% time NOT doing GC)

targets.expr: max by (cluster) (rate(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))
min by (cluster) (rate(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))
avg by (cluster) (rate(jvm_gc_collection_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"}[1m]))
max by (cluster) (jvm_memory_bytes_used{area="heap", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
min by (cluster) (jvm_memory_bytes_used{area="heap", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
avg by (cluster) (jvm_memory_bytes_used{area="heap", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
min by (cluster) (jvm_memory_bytes_max{area="heap", cluster=~"$cluster", datacenter=~"$datacenter", rack=~"$rack", host_name=~"$node"})
